description: Multi-enrollment SMTP-to-msg bridge. Each enrollment receives email through the UnitySVC SMTP gateway and forwards it to a per-enrollment HTTP endpoint as the strict `{title, body, type, format}` notification envelope (Apprise-api `/notify` shape; drop-in for apprise-api, mailrise, or any compatible receiver). Customers supply the destination URL as an enrollment parameter (`base_url`) and an optional customer-secret name for auth (`api_key_secret`). Use this when you want different chat / push / paging destinations per route under a single account.
name: smtp-to-msg-plus

payout_price.description: No platform commission — customer uses own HTTP receiver
